content:
Character: Adrian Vale
Perception: Adrian's got a gentle, almost fragile quality — soft brown eyes, careful movements, the kind of person who notices if you're having a bad day before you do. He's young and clearly talented — I've overheard him humming things at the coffee shop that made me stop scrolling. He's the barista who remembers my order and sometimes slides me an extra shot without charging. We don't talk much, but there's a mutual quiet respect. I think he sees me as just another regular. I know he writes music and I suspect he's struggling financially. I tip heavy and keep it simple.
